intent_tree: {"Find the webpage for an article the user wants to save": {"Search using known details (title, keywords)": {}, "Check browser history or bookmarks": {}, "Retrace steps from other sources (social media, newsletters, etc.)": {}, "Use saved link services (Pocket, Instapaper, etc.)": {}, "Verify webpage accessibility programmatically": {"Install necessary libraries": {}, "Write a script to check webpage status": {"Send HTTP request to the URL": {}, "Handle response codes": {}, "Catch and report errors": {}}, "Run the script with the target URL": {}}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "Search for the article using search engines with title or keywords"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "Use advanced search operators like 'site:' if partial domain is known"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "Access browser history to locate previously visited articles"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "Check browser bookmarks for saved links to the article"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "Investigate external sources like social media or email newsletters"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "Check tools like Pocket, Instapaper, or Raindrop.io for saved articles"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "Install the `requests` library in Python"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "Write a Python function to send an HTTP GET request to the target URL"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "Handle HTTP response codes (e.g., 200 for success, 4xx/5xx for errors)"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "Catch exceptions for invalid URLs, timeouts, or network issues"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "Run the Python script with the article's URL as input"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "refineSearch"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "checkBookmarksAfterHistory"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "useSavedLinkServicesAfterExternalSources"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "dependencyForScript"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "processResponse"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "handleErrors"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "executeScript"}]}
